Here is a Python function that implements the above steps:

```python
def generate_plantuml_diagram(node, node_id):
    symbols = ['@startuml', '@enduml']
    node_symbols = []

    for symbol in node['symbols']:
        if symbol not in symbols or symbol != node_id[symbol]:
            raise ValueError('Node ' + symbol + ' does not have the correct symbol.')

        node_symbols.append(symbol)

    diagram = '''\
    <Symbol name="node">
      <Symbol id="1"/>
      <Symbol id="2"/>
      <...more symbols>
        <symbol id="0"/>
        <symbol id="1"/>
        <symbol id="2"/>
        <...more symbols>
            <symbol id="0"/>
            <symbol id="1"/>
            <symbol id="2"/>
            <...more symbols>
                <symbol id="0"/>
            </symbol>
        </Symbol>
    </Symbol>

    # ... <symbols>
      <Symbol id="3"/>
      <Symbol id="4"/>
      <...more symbols>
        <symbol id="5"/>
        <symbol id="6"/>
        <symbol id="7"/>
        <symbol id="8"/>
        <symbol id="9"/>
        <symbol id="10"/>
        <symbol id="20"/>
        <symbol id="21"/>
        <...more symbols>
            <symbol id="30"/>
            <symbol id="41"/>
            <symbol id="51"/>
            <symbol id="61"/>
        </Symbol>
    </Symbol>

    # ... <symbols>
      <Symbol id="9"/>
      <Symbol id="22"/>
      <...more symbols>
        <symbol id="32"/>
        <symbol id="42"/>
        <symbol id="52"/>
        <symbol id="62"/>
        <symbol id="73"/>
        <...more symbols>
            <symbol id="83"/>
            <symbol id="109"/>
            <symbol id="33"/>
            <symbol id="43"/>
            <symbol id="53"/>
        </Symbol>
    </Symbol>

    # ... <symbols>
      <Symbol id="10"/>
      <Symbol id="20"/>
      <...more symbols>
        <symbol id="30"/>
        <symbol id="40"/>
        <symbol id="50"/>
        <symbol id="60"/>
        <symbol id="70"/>
        <symbol id="80"/>
        <symbol id="90"/>
        <symbol id="101"/>
        <...more symbols>
            <symbol id="31"/>
            <symbol id="41"/>
            <symbol id="51"/>
            <symbol id="61"/>
            <symbol id="72"/>
            <symbol id="83"/>
            <symbol id="93"/>
          </Symbol>
      </Symbol>

    </Symbol>
    '''

    diagram += '
'.join(lines)

    return '
'.join(diagram)
```
